person.name: Hansol Cho
person.title: AI Transformation Lead (Manager), AX Team at F&F Corporation
person.summary: B2B sales and AI transformation leader with 8+ years driving revenue growth across media, fashion, and technology verticals in the Korean market. Managed KRW 3-4B in annual deal flow with 85% client retention, led organization-wide AI adoption for 320 employees, and personally built production AI systems using Claude, MCP protocol, and knowledge graphs.

companies.name: F&F Corporation
companies.description: Global fashion group with brands including MLB, Discovery Expedition, Duvetica, and Sergio Tacchini

companies.name: CJ ENM
companies.description: Korea's largest entertainment and media conglomerate (NASDAQ: CJENM)

companies.name: ThePlayCompany
companies.description: Startup where Hansol delivered C-level Claude-centric AI integration training

companies.name: Univ
companies.description: Startup where Hansol delivered CEO-level 8-session Claude AI integration program

companies.name: Kyung Hee University
companies.description: University in Seoul where Hansol earned a Bachelor of Arts in Philosophy

positions.title: AI Transformation Lead (Manager), AX Team
key_responsibilities: Scaled AI image generation from KRW 40M PoC to KRW 1B enterprise deployment
Lead 8-person cross-functional team delivering AI solutions across 5 global fashion brands
Designed and delivered company-wide AI adoption programs for 320 employees (200 Korea, 120 China)
Served as AI Committee Main PM, providing regular AI strategy briefings to CEO and CDO
Led AI transformation of China subsidiary (120 employees) with Alibaba Cloud-based infrastructure
Built and deployed 3 production MCP servers (50+ tools) powering daily enterprise operations
Implemented 12-criterion automated quality validation with 11 auto-fail gates for AI-generated content

positions.title: Business Development Manager, Digital Strategy
key_responsibilities: Managed KRW 3-4B annual portfolio of digital marketing consulting engagements with Samsung, Nexon, Kakao Webtoon, Tencent, TikTok
Achieved 85% client renewal rate through consultative data-driven approach
Generated KRW 2B in annual new business revenue by identifying digital transformation opportunities
Pioneered Korea's first generative AI content production pipeline in MCN industry (November 2022)
Established foundational partnership with TikTok (ByteDance) during Korea market entry

positions.title: Business Development Associate, Influencer Business
key_responsibilities: Recruited and grew 5+ YouTube partner channels to 1M+ subscribers each
Managed IP licensing and digital advertising operations
Developed data-driven content consulting methodologies that became team standard

projects.title: Fashion Image Tagging Automation System
projects.summary: Claude-assisted automated tagging system for 150,000 fashion images — the catalyst for F&F's enterprise-wide AI transformation.
projects.description: Built a 2-stage pipeline using Claude as coding assistant and GPT-4o Vision API for image analysis, processing 150,000 fashion images in 5 days with 90% cost reduction and 90% accuracy. Designed 47 fashion taxonomy categories (120+ clothing types, 50+ colors, 41 materials) with synonym normalization. Evolved through 3 generations (V2→V3) with specialized versions for clothing, accessories, and general items. This system provided the quality training data foundation for the subsequent Varco Art project.
projects.scale_metrics: 150,000 images processed in 5 days, 47 taxonomy categories, 7 Python scripts, 3 generations

projects.title: AX Team Claude Code Skills Platform
projects.summary: Shared Claude Code custom skill ecosystem for the 8-person AX team with automated skill creation, deployment, and synchronization.
projects.description: Built a Claude Code custom skills ecosystem used by the entire 8-person AX team, with 9+ specialized skills covering image generation, Instagram analysis, K-pop SNS search, CEO reporting PPT, and LLM API documentation. Implemented automated skill-push/skill-sync via GitHub Actions so team members can update skills with a single Claude Code command. Operated as a private GitHub repository with Playwright MCP integration.
projects.scale_metrics: 9+ specialized skills, 8 team members, private GitHub repo with auto-sync

projects.title: F&F Knowledge Graph — Enterprise BI MCP Server
projects.title_kr: F&F Knowledge Graph — 엔터프라이즈 BI MCP 서버
projects.summary: MCP server with 37 intent nodes and 29 API tools enabling Claude to analyze sales, SCM, and organizational data across 5 fashion brands.
projects.description: Architected a Knowledge Graph-based MCP server connecting Claude to 5 brands' (MLB, Discovery, MLB KIDS, Duvetica, Sergio Tacchini) sales, supply chain, and organizational data. Features 37 intent nodes, 29 API tools, and 9 skill-based intents supporting daily/weekly/monthly/seasonal time-series analysis. Deployed on corporate intranet as a production analytics system, reducing reporting bottlenecks by 50% and enabling natural-language BI queries across the organization.
projects.scale_metrics: 37 intent nodes, 29 API tools, 5 brands, production intranet deployment

projects.title: Autoskill — Claude Autonomous Skill Generation Pipeline
projects.title_kr: Autoskill — Claude 자율 스킬 생성 파이프라인
projects.summary: End-to-end pipeline that automatically discovers tech trends, extracts content, and uses Claude Code headless mode to autonomously generate and deploy skills.
projects.description: Built a 2,549 LOC Python system combining open-source trend research (last30days skill for Reddit/X/YouTube/Web) with a custom bridge for scoring and deduplication, feeding into Claude Code headless mode for autonomous skill generation. Features a 5-stage pipeline (URL polling → content extraction → skill generation → task matching → diagram visualization), Notion 2-DB architecture, 3-tier content extraction fallback (Trafilatura → Jina Reader → FxTwitter), and Gemini-powered 4-panel comic visualization. Includes responsible AI safety mechanisms: Circuit Breaker (5 consecutive failures → 300s pause), Kill Switch, audit logging (JSONL), and max-turns limiting.
projects.scale_metrics: 2,549 LOC, 5-stage autonomous pipeline, 3-tier extraction fallback, safety circuit breaker

projects.title: FNF Studio — AI Fashion Image Generation MCP Server
projects.title_kr: FNF Studio — AI 패션 이미지 생성 MCP 서버
projects.summary: In-house MCP-based AI image generation platform replacing external vendor dependency, with 17 tools, 7,350 presets, and 12-criterion quality validation.
projects.description: After experiencing limitations of outsourced NC Soft Varco Art vendor (high per-image cost ¥2,500+, inability to encode brand DNA, slow iteration), redesigned the system from first principles. Built an in-house platform with 119 Python files, 17 MCP tools (brand cuts, virtual try-on, background replacement, AI influencer, selfie/UGC, gallery, CSV export), 7,350 preset combinations (75 poses × 98 scenes with compatibility matrix), and a 12-criterion MLBValidator with weighted scoring and 11 auto-fail gates. Achieved 68-80% cost reduction, 50% faster generation, 78% first-pass quality rate, enabling KRW 1B enterprise expansion.
projects.scale_metrics: 119 Python files, 17 MCP tools, 7,350 preset combinations, 12-criterion validator, 11 auto-fail gates

projects.title: FNF Entertainment Insights Dashboard + Grok VLM Knowledge Cutoff Solution
projects.title_kr: FNF Entertainment Insights Dashboard + Grok VLM 지식단절 극복
projects.summary: Real-time 4-platform trend analysis dashboard with a hybrid Grok-Gemini pipeline solving VLM knowledge cutoff for K-pop analysis.
projects.description: Built a full-stack dashboard (Next.js 15 + NestJS 11 monorepo) analyzing trends across Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, and X in real-time. Encountered Gemini Vision's knowledge cutoff problem (unable to identify post-Jan 2025 K-pop groups like CORTIS, Hearts2Hearts). Solved with a 2-stage hybrid pipeline: Grok real-time web search for context enrichment → injection into Gemini vision analysis. Implemented 3-tier enrichment strategy (Local KB $0 → File Cache $0 → Grok API ~$0.005) for cost optimization. A/B tested: virality scores went from 0/10 to 9/10 with Grok context injection at only ~$0.005 additional cost per query.
projects.scale_metrics: 4 platforms, 5-category analysis framework, virality score 0→9 improvement, ~$0.055/query

projects.title: Influencer Seeding Content Management Platform (FnCo)
projects.summary: End-to-end influencer marketing platform from crawling to AI planning to image generation to performance tracking across 3 regions.
projects.description: Built a comprehensive influencer marketing platform with React 18 frontend (40+ shadcn/ui components, MUI X Data Grid Premium), Express.js v5 backend, FastAPI AI microservices, and multi-platform crawlers (Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, X). Features 4-stage content lifecycle (Seeding → Preview → UGC → Performance), AI-powered marketing plan generation from PDF/PPT uploads via Gemini, 8-item AI video analysis with improvement suggestions, Azure AD SSO with 3-level RBAC, and support for 3 regions (Korea/China/Global).
projects.scale_metrics: 3 regions, 4-stage lifecycle, 40+ UI components, Azure AD SSO, RBAC

projects.title: Content Factory — Beauty Content Knowledge Graph + Graph RAG
projects.title_kr: Content Factory — 뷰티 콘텐츠 Knowledge Graph + Graph RAG
projects.summary: 5-generation knowledge graph system transforming 194 beauty video engagement datasets into structured knowledge with 4-tool agentic RAG for automated content planning.
projects.description: Built a knowledge graph system evolving through 5 generations (NetworkX prototype → Neo4j production) that transforms 194 beauty video engagement datasets into structured knowledge with VLM multimodal analysis. Features 4-tool agentic RAG with LLM Intent Router (analyze_performance, recommend_recipe, diagnose_hook, generate_draft_plan), HybridRetriever combining vector and full-text search, 12-type Hook classification system, and scene-level multimodal analysis. Demonstrates the thesis that proprietary data structured for LLM reasoning becomes a startup's competitive moat.
projects.scale_metrics: 194 videos, 5 generations, 4-tool RAG, 12 hook types, Neo4j production

projects.title: Enterprise AI Education & AI Committee Operations
projects.title_kr: 전사 AI 교육 & AI Committee 운영
projects.summary: Led AI adoption transformation for 320 employees across Korea (200) and China (120) with 4.8/5.0 satisfaction, plus AI Committee PM with regular CEO/CDO briefings.
projects.description: Designed and executed company-wide AI adoption programs including: AI Committee Main PM with regular technology briefings to CEO (Chairman) and CDO (Managing Director); domestic AI education for 200+ employees with role-specific curricula for designers, content creators, marketers, and e-biz teams; China subsidiary AI transformation for 120 employees achieving 4.8/5.0 satisfaction with cross-border AI workflow standardization; and AI Challengers program for talent selection resulting in promotions. Presented the company-wide Marketing AX Roadmap at the 2026 corporate kickoff.
projects.scale_metrics: 320 employees (200 Korea + 120 China), 4.8/5.0 satisfaction, CEO/CDO regular briefings

projects.title: Context Architect Training — Strategic AI Enablement for Startup Executives
projects.title_kr: Context Architect Training — 스타트업 경영진 AI 내재화 교육
projects.summary: Claude-centric AI integration curriculum for startup C-level executives, achieving 90%+ assignment completion and driving adoption buying signals.
projects.description: Designed and delivered Claude-centric AI integration curriculum for startup C-level executives: a 5-session program for 16 leaders (CEO, department heads) at ThePlayCompany and a CEO-level 8-session program at Univ. Achieved 90%+ assignment completion from executives whose time is most valuable. Post-training, participants shifted from tool-usage questions to technical integration inquiries (MCP connections, LLM pipelines), demonstrating that education drives adoption — a clear buying signal validating the AE approach.
projects.scale_metrics: 16 leaders at ThePlayCompany, 8-session CEO program at Univ, 90%+ completion rate

projects.title: AI News Reporter Agent
projects.summary: Automated news agent tracking 6 global/Korean AI sources including Anthropic Blog, with LLM pricing comparison calculator.
projects.description: Built a 3-layer architecture (Crawler → Analyzer → Reporter) agent that automatically tracks 6 AI news sources (TechCrunch AI, Anthropic Blog, OpenAI Blog, AI Times, ZDNet Korea, generic) using Playwright headless browser. Features 3 operational modes: news analysis, API documentation analysis, and pricing comparison calculator. Syncs to Notion DB for automated weekly report generation. Anthropic Blog is configured as the #1 priority crawling source.
projects.scale_metrics: 6 sources, 3 modes, Notion DB auto-sync, Anthropic Blog as #1 source

projects.title: Linn Custom Nodes — AI Fashion Photography Automation (ComfyUI)
projects.title_kr: Linn Custom Nodes — AI 패션 촬영 자동화 (ComfyUI)
projects.summary: 28,820-line Python codebase with 104+ custom ComfyUI nodes for AI video/image generation pipeline including Photography DNA systems.
projects.description: Developed a comprehensive AI video/image generation pipeline with 28,820 lines of Python across 53 modules and 104+ custom ComfyUI nodes. Features 3 Photography DNA systems (Studio/Outdoor/Snapshot with detailed camera, lens, lighting, and mood prompt engineering), full video analysis pipeline (load → AI analysis via Gemini → JSON shot plan → frame extraction → image generation → video synthesis), batch CAD-to-photorealistic conversion, face swap, background compositing (3 versions), pose/texture/color transformations, and session-based + file-based persistent memory for cost optimization.
projects.scale_metrics: 28,820 LOC, 53 modules, 104+ custom nodes, 3 Photography DNA systems
